profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Era Mandiri Cemerlang Tbk produces and supplies seafood products in Indonesia and internationally. The company offers yellowfin tuna, bigeye tuna, oilfish, swordfish, black pomfret, Spanish mackerel, shark, red snapper, bullet tuna, skipjack tuna, wahoo, goldband snapper, leather jacket, emperor, parrotfish, mahi-mahi, grouper, milkfish, and other fish products; squid products; and octopus products. It exports its products to the United States, Mexico, Ecuador, Germany, the Netherlands, Poland, Portugal, Hong Kong, China, India, the Philippines, and various Middle Eastern countries. PT Era Mandiri Cemerlang Tbk was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Jakarta Utara, Indonesia.
